name: SBI Card Elite

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹10,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 2 Reward Points per ₹100 spent on all purchases
5X Reward Points on dining (10 RP per ₹100)
5X Reward Points on grocery spends (10 RP per ₹100)
5X Reward Points on departmental store spends (10 RP per ₹100)
5X Reward Points on movie ticket purchases (10 RP per ₹100)

welcomeBenefits.condition: On spending ₹10,000 within 60 days of card issuance

additionalBenefits: Buy 1 Get 1 free on movie tickets via BookMyShow (up to ₹250 off, once per month)
Trident Privilege Red Tier complimentary membership
pros: 5X rewards on dining, grocery, departmental stores, and movies
Strong milestone benefits with achievable tiers
Welcome benefit covers the joining fee
Buy 1 Get 1 free movie tickets monthly
cons: High waiver threshold of ₹10 lakh annual spend
Base reward point value of ₹0.25 per point is low
Many common categories excluded from rewards
idealFor: Users who spend heavily on dining and groceries
Movie enthusiasts who want BOGO offers
Those looking for a solid all-round premium card

faqs.question: How much is the welcome benefit worth?
faqs.answer: You get e-gift vouchers worth ₹5,000 when you spend ₹10,000 within 60 days of getting the card. This effectively makes the first year free.

faqs.question: How do the accelerated rewards work?
faqs.answer: You earn 5X reward points (10 RP per ₹100 instead of 2 RP) on dining, grocery, departmental stores, and movie ticket purchases.

faqs.question: What airport lounges can I access?
faqs.answer: SBI Card Elite provides 8 domestic and 6 international lounge visits per year through the Visa/Priority Pass network.

faqs.question: Is the annual fee waivable?
faqs.answer: Yes, the ₹4,999 annual fee is waived if your annual spending crosses ₹10,00,000. Milestone benefits can also offset the fee at lower spend levels.
